templates.title: Tooth Hoarder
templates.description: Finish the week with at least 4 unused Tooth cards in your hand.

templates.title: Two of a Kind
templates.description: Complete at least one bagino AND at least one bagina.

templates.title: Generous
templates.description: Initiate at least 2 successful trades over the week.

templates.title: Patient
templates.description: Don't draw any cards on Monday.

templates.title: Spendthrift
templates.description: End the game with zero poo tokens.
